description: A tire specialist monitors the condition of haul truck tires to maximize their lifespan and avoid premature failures.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve real-time data from the tire pressure monitoring system (TPMS) for the entire truck fleet.

expected_outcome.expected: A dashboard shows the current pressure and temperature of every tire.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert for a tire on truck HT-25 that is running hot and losing pressure.

expected_outcome.expected: The specialist acknowledges the alert, which indicates a potential problem.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the mine dispatcher to route the truck to the workshop immediately for a tire change to prevent a blowout.

expected_outcome.expected: The truck is safely routed to the workshop, and a potentially dangerous tire failure is averted.
